description: Part 10/10: Add OnInit(), OnDeinit(), OnCalculate() functions to tie everything together. Add alert system, XLAOL line management, cleanup on deinit, and final integration.
steps: Implement OnInit() - initialize all arrays to default values, set TF_LABELS and TF_CATEGORIES arrays, initialize seq_states
Implement OnDeinit() - clean up all MT5 chart objects by iterating through all tracked boxes, LAOL lines, HCS boxes, RR boxes, and XLAOL lines, calling ObjectDelete for each

Implement OnCalculate() - the main tick handler that: 1) Retrieves MTF data for all 25 TFs, 2) Calls CalculatePatterns for each TF, 3) Runs the main processing loop (third/laol step detection, HCS detection, box creation, box management), 4) Updates LAOL lines, 5) Manages HCS boxes, 6) Evaluates setups and generates display text, 7) Handles RR box creation/deletion, 8) Manages XLAOL lines (extend, break detection, deletion), 9) Sends alerts, 10) Resets per-tick arrays

Implement XLAOL line management in OnCalculate(): Extend all _xlaol lines by updating x2 to current bar. Check if price hit level (bear: high > level, bull: low < level). Delete hit lines and their labels. Track which categories were hit for alerts.

Implement Alert system using MT5 Alert() function - matching all alert() and alertcondition() calls from Pine Script: BEAR FORMING, BEAR CONFIRMED, BULL FORMING, BULL CONFIRMED, FINAL ENTRY BEAR, FINAL ENTRY BULL, ENTRY LAOL BEAR/BULL TAKEN, SCALP LAOL BEAR/BULL TAKEN
Add proper bar counting (equivalent of bar_index) using a global counter incremented in OnCalculate
Ensure all visual objects are properly updated on each tick (extend boxes to right, update LAOL line positions)
Do a final review of the entire file to ensure no compilation errors, proper function call order, no undefined variables
Commit and push with message 'feat: STX Edge MT5 Part 10/10 - OnInit/OnCalculate/OnDeinit and alerts'
acceptance_criteria: OnDeinit cleans up all chart objects
OnCalculate processes each tick correctly in the right order
All alerts are fired matching Pine Script conditions
XLAOL lines extend and break correctly
The file is complete and should compile in MetaEditor without errors
verification: Read the complete file and verify logical flow
Verify no undefined function calls or variables
Verify the file is syntactically valid MQL5
findings: Implemented as part of complete single-file rewrite in FEAT-006.
